💰 Deployable Capital Score
Not AUM — deployable capital right now. A ₹500 Cr fund that deployed ₹350 Cr last year is far more valuable than a ₹3,000 Cr fund that deployed ₹80 Cr.
📈 Investment Velocity — Active vs Dormant
Many large funds are inactive. Velocity = deals closed last 12 months. Prioritise high-velocity funds for deal distribution.
👤 Decision Maker Layer
Most directories stop at fund name and email. ipowork goes deeper: CIO, Fund Manager, Investment Director, Principal, Partner — with role and direct contact.
🔗 Co-investment Graph
Funds that invest together. If Sequoia and Premji Invest co-invested 3 times, a deal that fits one likely fits both. Network intelligence for faster distribution.
